synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-1838 Moderate: Oracle Linux 10 image-builder security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-1838

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-1838.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
image-builder-45-1.0.2.el10.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
image-builder-45-1.0.2.el10.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/image-builder-45-1.0.2.el10.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-58183




Description of changes:

[45-1.0.2]
- Fix CVE-2025-58183
